variables.name: EVEC.1
variables.description: 1st eigenvector from principal components analysis used as a covariate in adjusted GWAS

variables.name: EVEC.2
variables.description: 2nd eigenvector from principal components analysis used as a covariate in adjusted GWAS

variables.name: EVEC.3
variables.description: 3rd eigenvector from principal components analysis used as a covariate in adjusted GWAS

variables.name: EVEC.4
variables.description: 4th eigenvector from principal components analysis used as a covariate in adjusted GWAS

variables.name: ExclusionReason
variables.description: Non-Caucasian = Subject deemed non caucasian based on self-reported race and Structure Analyses Non-Compliant = Subject was deemed non compliant

variables.name: IsExcluded
variables.description: Indicator of whether subject was excluded from GWAS

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: age
variables.description: Age at Consent

variables.name: ageonset
variables.description: Age at onset of first major depressive episode

variables.name: consentMonth
variables.description: Month subject consented to study

variables.name: consentYear
variables.description: Year subject consented to study

variables.name: currentempstat
variables.description: Current employment status

variables.name: currentonsetMonth
variables.description: Month of onset for current major depression episode

variables.name: currentonsetYear
variables.description: Year of onset for current major depression episode

variables.name: currentstudent
variables.description: Is subject currently in school

variables.name: dose.b
variables.description: Dose of med.b drug prescribed at Baseline

variables.name: dose.w4
variables.description: Dose of drug (citalopram/escitalopram) subject is taking on their Week 4 visit

variables.name: dose.w8
variables.description: Dose of drug (citalopram/escitalopram) subject is taking on their Week 8 visit

variables.name: gender
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: height
variables.description: Baseline Height

variables.name: highdegree
variables.description: Highest degree completed

variables.name: hrsdtotal.b
variables.description: HRSD (Hamilton Rating Scale for Depression) total score at Baseline

variables.name: livewithspouse
variables.description: Indicator of whether subject lives with spouse

variables.name: lookup.race
variables.description: Race description

variables.name: maritalstatus
variables.description: Marital status

variables.name: med.b
variables.description: Medication at Baseline (citalopram/escitalopram)

variables.name: psychotherapy
variables.description: Are you currently involved in psychotherapy

variables.name: qids.response2.w4
variables.description: Responder if QIDSCpctChange_W4 > = 50 , Non Responder if QIDSCpctChange_W4 < 50

variables.name: qids.response2.w8
variables.description: Responder if QIDSCpctChange_W8 >= 50 , Non Responder if QIDSCpctChange_W8 < 50

variables.name: qidscpctchange
variables.description: Difference between final visit QIDSC and baseline QIDSC, divided by baseline QIDSC and multiplied by 100.   If no W4 or W8 data then change set to 0.

variables.name: qidscpctchange.w4
variables.description: (([QIDSCTotal_W4]-[QIDSCTotal_B])/[QIDSCTotal_B]*100)

variables.name: qidscpctchange.w8
variables.description: (([QIDSCTotal_W8]-[QIDSCTotal_B])/[QIDSCTotal_B]*100)

variables.name: qidsctotal.b
variables.description: QIDSC (Quick Inventory of Depressive Symptomatology) total score at Baseline

variables.name: qidsctotal.w4
variables.description: QIDSC total score at Week 4

variables.name: qidsctotal.w8
variables.description: QIDSC total score at Week8

variables.name: race
variables.description: Race code

variables.name: remission
variables.description: Last visit remission defined as Remitter if  last visit QIDS C <= 5, Non Remitter if last visit QIDSC > 5.  If no W4 or W8 data then remission defined as Non Remitter.

variables.name: remissionqids.w4
variables.description: QIDSC remission status at Week 4 (Remitter if  QIDSCTotal_W4 < =5, Non Remitter if QIDSCTotal_W4 > 5)

variables.name: remissionqids.w8
variables.description: QIDSC remission status at Week 8 (Remitter if  QIDSCTotal_W8 < =5, Non Remitter if QIDSCTotal_W8 > 5)

variables.name: response
variables.description: Last-visit response defined as Responder if QIDSCpctChange >=50 , Non Responder if QIDSCpctChange < 50.   If no W4 or W8 data then response defined as Non Responder

variables.name: seasonalpattern
variables.description: Is there a seasonal pattern to your depression

variables.name: weight
variables.description: Baseline Weight

variables.name: yearsschool
variables.description: Total number of years completed

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID (SAME values as SUBJID)

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID (SAME values as SUBJID)

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
